intro: The clearest split is that Novu has a free tier while CleverTap does not. CleverTap is Mobile engagement and retention platform with push, in-app, SMS, email, and built-in analytics and; Novu is Open-source notification infrastructure with multi-channel support, in-app feed, user preferences, and self-hostable backend. The data points CleverTap at mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging, and Novu at mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging. Pricing: CleverTap is subscription from $75; Novu is freemium, free tier. Lock-in is high for CleverTap and low for Novu, with DX at 4/5 vs 5/5 and transparency at 3/5 vs 5/5. On listed strengths, CleverTap emphasises mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging, and Novu emphasises mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging. Both offer an enterprise tier for larger rollouts. Honest trade-off: neither fits web-only products without mobile, so if that is your context, look elsewhere; otherwise pick on the pivotal factor above and the DX score that matters most to your team.
quick_take: CleverTap is for mobile; Novu is for mobile; decide based on whether a free tier matters.
verdict_a: Choose CleverTap if starting on a paid subscription upfront is acceptable and your workload matches mobile. Skip it if your context is web-only products without mobile.
verdict_b: Choose Novu if you want to start on a free tier before paying and your workload matches mobile. Skip it if your context is web-only products without mobile.

faq.a: Listed entry pricing is $75 for CleverTap and $0 for Novu. Novu offers a free tier while CleverTap does not, so initial cost favors Novu. Total cost at scale depends on usage and plan details that are not in this dataset, so confirm with each vendor.

faq.q: Can I migrate from CleverTap to Novu?
faq.a: CleverTap is tagged with high lock-in (proprietary engagement platform). Novu is tagged with low lock-in (oss notification infrastructure, self-hostable). At least one side is high lock-in, so budget migration time for re-implementing integrations.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, CleverTap or Novu?
faq.a: The dataset rates Novu at 5/5 for developer experience and CleverTap at 4/5, so Novu scores higher. That score reflects overall polish rather than any single integration, so trial both against your stack before committing.

faq.q: Is Novu a good alternative to CleverTap?
faq.a: Yes for teams whose workload matches mobile, since both list the same fit. Novu is flagged as not for web-only products without mobile, so confirm your context does not fall there. Note that moving from CleverTap to Novu means gaining access to a free tier.
